name: energy_anomaly
description: Finds buildings with high energy consumption and very low occupancy, indicating energy-occupancy divergence waste.
query:
FROM nyc-buildings
| STATS
    avg_occupancy    = AVG(occupancy_pct),
    total_energy_kwh = SUM(energy_kwh)
  BY building_id, borough
| EVAL
    total_energy_cost = total_energy_kwh * 0.19,
    waste_score       = (1 - avg_occupancy) * total_energy_kwh
| WHERE avg_occupancy < 0.15 AND total_energy_kwh > 5000
| SORT total_energy_cost DESC
| LIMIT 15
